blocks.text: Match preview: West Indies Women face Sri Lanka Women in 17th Match, Group B (T20) on Sun, 21 Jun, 2026, 3:00 pm at County Ground Bristol. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.

rows: West Indies Women vs Sri Lanka Women

blocks.text: Standard T20 surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 160–180 runs par score.
Overcast · High 28°C / Low 15°C · Rain: 0 mm · Wind: up to 10 km/h. Cloud cover expected — seamers may get movement with the new ball.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
